name: Broccoli Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb broccoli, cut into bite size pieces
1 1/2 lbs potatoes, peeled and boiled until somewhat soft
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly steam the broccoli.
2. Cut the potatoes into the size that would be used for potato salad.
3. Mix the broccoli, potatoes, lemon juice, garlic, basil, and oregano together.
4. Divide the pizza dough into two parts; one slightly more than half the dough.
5. Roll out the larger piece of dough and place it on a pizza peel.
6. Top with the broccoli/potato mixture.
7. Roll out the smaller piece of dough and place it on top of the bottom of the pie.
8. Using a rolling motion, bring the lower crust over the top crust and seal.
9. Bake at 450°F on a pizza stone for 15 minutes.
10. Serve with pasta/pizza sauce.
